description: Local LLM inference for the fleet, served by vLLM. A little model comes up fast for instant responses while a bigger model warms in the background; requests route to whichever tier is ready. OpenAI-compatible (/v1/chat/completions). This is the owner-enabled inference resource of ADR-0018 — GPU-gated, so the manager only offers it on capable nodes (gx10), never the ARM boards.

littleModel.description: The little model served first — small, loads in seconds so the endpoint is answering almost immediately.

bigModel.description: The big model warmed in the background. Requests route to it once it is ready; null = little model only.

port.description: Port the vLLM OpenAI-compatible server listens on inside the device.

maxModelLen.description: Maximum context length. Lower it if the model OOMs on load.

gpuMemoryUtilization.description: Fraction of GPU memory vLLM may reserve. On the GB10's unified 128 GB this leaves headroom for the background big-model load.

dtype.description: Weight dtype. "auto" picks the model's native precision (bfloat16 on the GB10).

modelCacheDir.description: Host dir (bind-mounted) for downloaded weights. MUST be on a big volume — gx10's root fs is nearly full, so keep this on /srv/models.
